stories.title: Judge vs. Murakami HR Race Is Tied — Both at 15 With the Season Still Young

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The 2026 MLB home run race is tied.

Aaron Judge: 15. Munetaka Murakami: 15.

Murakami hit a solo shot May 9 to draw even. A Yankees legend and a first-year Japanese star sharing the lead 40 games in. This is the race baseball needed. ⚾ #Yankees #WhiteSox #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Munetaka Murakami has 15 HRs and has yet to hit a multi-homer game.

He also holds the MLB record for most home runs before a first double or triple. First-year player. 15 pitchers. Every homer from a different arm.

This is not a typical rookie season. ⚾ #WhiteSox #MLB

research.facts:
Judge vs. Murakami HR Race Tied at 15
**Decision:** FOLLOW UP. HR race was introduced in previous pipelines (Judge alone or Judge leading). Murakami tying Judge on May 9 is the new development.
**Sources:**
1. SI.com — "The Eye-Popping Numbers Behind Aaron Judge, Munetaka Murakami's Power Surge" (2026)
2. MLB.com — "Munetaka Murakami ties Aaron Judge in MLB home runs" (May 9, 2026)
3. Yardbarker — "The two sluggers battling for the MLB's home run lead" (May 2026)
4. ESPN — Aaron Judge 2026 stats pages (current)
**Key Facts:**
- Judge and Murakami both at 15 HRs [HIGH — MLB.com announcement confirming Murakami tied Judge on May 9]
- Judge career total: 383-384 HRs [HIGH — baseball-reference, confirmed in prior pipelines]
- Judge batting .273 in 2026, 15 HRs in ~38 games [HIGH]
- Murakami: signed 2-year $34M deal Dec 2025, first MLB season [HIGH — prior pipeline coverage]
- Murakami won NPB Triple Crown with 56 HRs in 2022 [HIGH — prior pipeline]
- Murakami holds MLB records for HRs before first double/triple in MLB history [HIGH — prior pipeline]
- Murakami hit HR on May 9 to tie Judge [HIGH — MLB.com]
**Freshness:** MLB.com article on Murakami tying Judge published May 9, 2026. Race is current.

stories.title: Henry Bolte Just Made His MLB Debut. What He Did Is Unprecedented.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Oakland A's called up Henry Bolte on Monday. He hit safely in 12 straight plate appearances with 9 extra-base hits.

Nobody has done that at the Major League level in the Expansion Era.

Not a bad first impression. ⚾ #Athletics #MLB

stories.title: José Ramírez Is 9 Home Runs From the 300-300 Club — A Conversation About History

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
José Ramírez has 300 career stolen bases and 291 career home runs.

He is 9 home runs from joining the 300-300 club. The club includes Willie Mays, Barry Bonds, and Alex Rodriguez.

There are 8 members. He wants to be the 9th. ⚾ #Guardians #MLB

stories.title: Elly De La Cruz Is Putting Together a Shortstop Season Nobody Has Seen

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Elly De La Cruz leads all MLB shortstops in WAR.

10 home runs. 8 stolen bases. .265 average. First shortstop since 1900 with 5+ HR and 5+ SB through 16 games.

He is 24 years old and playing the best shortstop in baseball. ⚾ #Reds #MLB
